Class GuiApp

java.lang.Object
javafx.application.Application
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui.GuiApp
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServerHandler
public final class GuiApp extends javafx.application.Application implements ServerHandler
JavaFX root: owns the Stage and the ClientSession, acts as the ServerHandler (marshalling messages onto the FX thread), and drives screen navigation: Connection → Nickname → Matches → Lobby → Game → EndGame. Each screen's onServerMessage(...) is always called on the FX thread.

  • Nested Class Summary

      public void showReconnectScreen(String matchId)
      Offers to resume a match the server crashed out of.

    • showRecoveryLobbyScreen

      public void showRecoveryLobbyScreen()
      Lobby-style waiting screen for a recovered match pending reconnections.

    • reconnectToPreviousMatch

      public boolean reconnectToPreviousMatch(String matchId, String nickname)
      Reopens a connection (reusing the last transport/host/port) and asks the server to resume the suspended match. Returns false if the server is still unreachable; the actual outcome of the resume arrives later as a GameStartedMessage (success) or an ErrorMessage (e.g. nickname mismatch).

    • leavePreviousMatchAndShowNickname

      public void leavePreviousMatchAndShowNickname(String matchId)
      Invoked by the reconnect screen's "Leave this match" button. Reopens a connection on the transport the player first chose to tell the server to delete the suspended match (and notify any player that already reconnected that the match is over), then keeps that connection and drops the player on the nickname scene so they can start a new match right away. Best-effort: if the server is unreachable there is no connection to keep, so we fall back to the initial transport-choice scene.

    • showTotemSelectionScreen

      public void showTotemSelectionScreen()
      Pre-game totem selection scene, shown once the lobby is full.

    • onServerMessage

      public void onServerMessage(ServerMessage message)
      Called from arbitrary threads (socket reader or RMI). Always re-dispatch on the JavaFX thread before touching UI.
      Specified by:
      onServerMessage in interface ServerHandler
